description: You are the station manager for an amateur radio satellite club. Complete the existing tracking modules and add a remote receive station. In the Linear module, ensure AO-7 (NORAD 7530) remains and add FO-29 (JAS-2, NORAD 24278) and FuncUBE-1 (AO-73, NORAD 39444). In the FM_Voice module, ensure AO-27 (NORAD 22825) remains and add SO-50 (SaudiSat 1C, NORAD 27607), AO-85 (Fox-1A, NORAD 40967), and AO-95 (Fox-1Cliff, NORAD 4

natural_language.prompt: I'm the station manager for a satellite amateur radio club and I need to finish setting up our GPredict configuration. We have two specialty modules that a previous operator started but never completed. First, the Linear module (for linear transponder satellites) only has AO-7 in it — please add FO-29 which is also called JAS-2 with NORAD number 24278, and FuncUBE-1 also known as AO-73 with NORAD number 39444. Keep AO-7 in there. Second, the FM_Voice module only has AO-27 in it — please add SO-50 (SaudiSat 1C, NORAD 27607), AO-85 (Fox-1A, NORAD 40967), and AO-95 (Fox-1Cliff, NORAD 43770). Keep AO-27. Finally, we just set up a remote receive site in New Jersey and I need you to add a ground station for it: call it Remote_RX, latitude 40.7484 north, longitude 74.0060 west, altitude 10 meters.
